untranslatable_reason: Signal requires statistical comparison of January returns vs. Feb-Dec average (dummy variable regression with OLS, p < 0.05). This is a cross-sectional statistical test not expressible using point-in-time technical indicators. The 'returns' indicator captures monthly returns but cannot encode the statistical hypothesis test (p-value comparison across month groups) or the regression methodology. The operator 'is' cannot map to a live regression calculation.
translation_notes: The signal fundamentally requires out-of-sample statistical analysis of historical monthly returns across all years in the dataset to establish significance. This is a pre-backtest hypothesis validation step, not a live trading rule. To implement: (1) Pre-compute January vs. other months t-test or regression p-value on historical data; (2) If p < 0.05, activate a simple rule: IF month==1 THEN buy NSE index, hold 31 days. The technical indicator framework cannot perform this test dynamically.
